summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing repeatable processes grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can bring structure to ambiguity and deliver measurable outcomes—through systematic, data-driven approaches.
